description: Cross-client parity for the DoS/cardinality BOUND VALUES (maps#10). These numeric caps are triplicated by value across the canonical rosetta-maps JSON Schema, the frida Zod validator (`src/validate/schema.ts`), and the xposed Kotlin `MapLoader` BoundsChecker — a one-sided edit would let a map that loads on one client be rejected by another. Each `bound` case names a shared constant and pins its exact value; BOTH client conformance runners read the constant from their OWN validator and assert it equals `value`, so any drift fails CI on both sides. Only the bounds BOTH clients enforce are listed: the Kotlin-only pre-parse guards (MAX_INPUT_BYTES, MAX_NESTING_DEPTH — they bound kotlinx's recursive decoder, which the Frida JSON.parse path has no analogue for) are intentionally omitted. Provider-neutral; see README.md.
